assumptions.statement: Identity is the substrate AI runs on.
assumptions.rationale: Agents acting on customer data are only as good as the identity layer beneath them. Amperity's resolution accuracy is the moat; if identity stays hard, the company sits under every AI budget in the category.

assumptions.statement: Repeatable work automates; judgment does not.
assumptions.rationale: Models take the repeatable middle of customer data work. The buying decision, the taste, and the accountability stay human. Product and go-to-market should split along that line.

assumptions.statement: Trust and retention are the asset.
assumptions.rationale: In a consolidating category the installed base is the balance sheet. Every quarter of retention above 90 buys another quarter of optionality on the AI story.

assumptions.statement: Speed beats polish in a turnaround.
assumptions.rationale: The founders came back to move. Shipping a credible answer in a week beats shipping the complete answer in a quarter, because the market is pricing the company's pace, not its roadmap.
Databricks, Snowflake, Salesforce, and Adobe absorb the stack around them. Independents either become the identity layer platforms depend on, or become features.

forces.statement: Amperity is squeezed from both sides.
forces.rationale: Platforms build identity down from the warehouse while composable tools build activation up from it. The middle only holds if accuracy stays visibly better.

forces.statement: AI changed what customer data is for.
forces.rationale: Customer data used to feed dashboards and campaigns. Now it feeds agents that act. The buyer, the budget line, and the proof of value all move with that shift.

forces.statement: Composable is the direction of travel.
forces.rationale: The stack keeps decomposing onto the warehouse. Fighting it loses; being the best identity layer inside it wins.
If platform-native resolution gets good enough for most brands, the premium for accuracy collapses. This is the bear case worth watching weekly.
Martech line items are being folded into data platform and AI line items. Selling into the old budget gets harder every quarter.

forces.statement: AI is moving from assist to execution.
forces.rationale: Copilots draft; agents do. When the agent executes the campaign, the system of record for customer identity becomes the system of trust.
